__fixture__.name: entry_sheet_restore_or_resume_managed_cloud
__fixture__.scenario: Paired with entry_row_recent_work_remote_resume.json. Resume of a managed-cloud workspace whose authority expired. The sheet emits with open_flow_sheet_class = restore_or_resume, sheet_surface_class = full_sheet. policy_restrictions_disclosure names authority_delta = revalidates, required_reviews includes tenant_review_required. result_mode resolves to resume_live_session. restore_class_disclosure names restore_level = compatible_restore, missing_target_states = [authority_expired_for_remote], per-pane session_execution_postures, checkpoint_linked_recovery_class = restore_from_session_checkpoint. fallback_disclosure names cancel, open_without_restore, return_to_start_center. Demonstrates §5.1 restore_or_resume, §5.2 restore_class_disclosure, §5.3 invariant 6.

target_type_disclosure.summary: Managed-cloud workspace. Authority expired; reauth required before live attach.

policy_restrictions_disclosure.summary: Authority is revalidated against the live session. Trust remains tenant-scoped.

result_mode_disclosure.summary: Live session resumes after reauth. A read-only placeholder remains until then.

trust_posture_disclosure.summary: Trust is revalidated at resume; expired authority blocks the resume until reauth completes.

restore_class_disclosure.summary: Compatible restore. Terminal transcripts rehydrate without re-run; debug reconnect available; managed-cloud reauth required first.

fallback_disclosure.summary: Cancel keeps the previous workspace. open_without_restore opens without rehydrating session evidence.

presentation_subtitle: Reauthenticate to resume. Read-only placeholder available until then.
